zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Brosyard Eyton於1377年出生在英國史洛普爾艾頓 亞爾 維姆時，他的父親Humphrey De Eyton22歲，母親Lady Jeanette de Eyton30歲。他於大約1404年與Sarah Foster在英國英格蘭史洛普爾艾頓 亞爾 維姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1464年在他的家鄉享年87歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Brosyard Eyton于1377年出生在英国史洛普爾艾頓 亞爾 維姆时，他的父亲Humphrey De Eyton22岁，母亲Lady Jeanette de Eyton30岁。他于大约1404年与Sarah Foster在英国英格兰史洛普爾艾頓 亞爾 維姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1464年在他的家乡享年87岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Eyton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Eyton (Shrops) or Eaton (Cheshire, Leics, Staffs), or Eaton Bray (Beds), Cold Eaton or Long Eaton (Derbys).

variants.name: Ayton
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Ayton (North Yorkshire) or Ayton (Berwickshire). The former is derived from Old Norse á ‘river, stream’ + tūn ‘farmstead’. The later takes its name from the River Eye (likely from Old English ēa ‘river, stream’) + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: Brosyard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Cyrille, Henri, Jean Charles, Pierre, Rosaire.
nickname for a brush maker, from brosse ‘brush’ + the pejorative suffix -ard, or perhaps a topographic name, cognate with Brosseau .

variants.name: Brosseau
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Adelard, Lucien, Pierre, Alphonse, Emile, Gaston, Jacques, Laurier, Lucienne, Michel, Rosaire.

French: topographic name derived from Old French broce ‘thicket, brushwood’ (from Late Latin bruscia), or a habitational name from Le Brosseau, the name of several places in the northwestern part of France named from this word. Compare Brousseau .

History: Denis Brosseau from Saint-Sébastien-sur-Loire in Loire-Atlantique, Brittany (France), married Marie-Madeleine Hébert in QC in 1670. Julien Brosseau/Brousseau dit Laverdure from Nantes in Loire-Atlantique, Brittany (France), married Simone Chalifou in Quebec City, QC, in 1668.

variants.name: Broussard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Alcide, Antoine, Pierre, Emile, Evest, Fernand, Minos, Ulysse, Alphe, Jacques.
History: The Broussard families of LA trace their ancestry to two Acadian brothers, Joseph and Alexandre, dit Beausoleil, who arrived in New Orleans in 1765.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Brosyard Eyton was born in 1377, in Eyton near Wem, Shropshire, England, his father, Humphrey De Eyton, was 22 and his mother, Lady Jeanette de Eyton, was 30. He married Sarah Foster about 1404, in Eyton near Wem, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1464, in his hometown, at the age of 87, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Brosyard Eyton est né en 1377, à Eyton near Wem, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Humphrey De Eyton, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Lady Jeanette d’Eyton, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Foster environ 1404, à Eyton near Wem, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1464, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

Er hat um 1404 in Eyton near Wem, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Sarah Foster geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1464 im Alter von 87 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in England begraben.

Lui sposato Sarah Foster circa 1404, nel Eyton near Wem, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1464, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 87 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Brosyard Eyton(이)가 1377년 영국 슈럽실르 이턴 니아어 w에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Humphrey De Eyton(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Jeanette de Eyton(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1404년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 이턴 니아어 w에서 Sarah Foster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1464년 그의 고향에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Brosyard Eyton nasceu em 1377, em Eyton near Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Humphrey De Eyton, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Lady Jeanette de Eyton, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Foster aproximadamente 1404, em Eyton near Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1464, em sua cidade natal, com 87 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Brosyard Eyton родился в 1377 г. в местности эитон нир вем, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Humphrey De Eyton было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Jeanette de Eyton, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Foster около 1404 г. в местности эитон нир вем, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1464 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 87 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Brosyard Eyton nació en 1377, en Eyton near Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Humphrey De Eyton, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Lady Jeanette de Eyton, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Sarah Foster aproximadamente 1404, en Eyton near Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1464, en su pueblo, a la edad de 87 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
